All 8 fixes target the exact same 4 lines (49, 70, 84, 98) and address the same underlying issue: in PatternFly v6, `Select`, `MenuToggle`, and related components no longer render a `<button>` element, so `screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Bulk select toggle' })` will fail.

**Change summary:** All 4 instances of `screen.getByRole('button', { name: 'Bulk select toggle' })` were replaced with `screen.getByLabelText('Bulk select toggle')`. This is a role-agnostic query that finds the element by its accessible label regardless of the underlying DOM element or ARIA role, making it resilient to the PF v6 changes where `Select`/`MenuToggle` no longer render `<button>` elements.
